parsed_review.summary: CP00-291 is a descriptor-only closeout pack covering the 10 RP08.P07.M05 "Permission And Audit Binding" failure-slice units (RP08.P07.M05.S05-S14; 8 failure_recovery, 1 security_audit, 1 implementation). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob; source_inspection_basis read_tools_used, satisfying the summary-only prohibition triggered by the security_audit deliverable) of contracts/email-dms-core-contract.json, packages/email-dms/src/{registry,service,validators}.js, test/model.test.js, scripts/validate-rp08-email-dms-core-contract.mjs, README.md, the live closeout-pack-plan, and the review artifacts confirms the pack-level readiness claim is supported and all boundaries hold. (1) Pack binding (EMAIL_DMS_CORE_CP291_PACK_BINDING) matches the plan pack and baseline exactly: id CP00-291, risk A, unit_count 10, range RP08.P07.M05.S05-RP08.P07.M05.S14, upstream CP00-290, next CP00-292/RP08.P07.M05.S15. required_section_rows enumerate exactly the 10 planned row titles; deliverable_counts (failure_recovery 8, security_audit 1, implementation 1) and micro_title count (10) match the prompt distributions. (2) Boundaries: freezeCp291Result and the persisted contract failure_slice_descriptor set every runtime/write/leak flag false (no email/office/sync/filing/AI runtime, no permission/audit eval, no DB/object-storage, no command runtime, no rollback/retry runtime, no lock acquisition, no hermes runtime receipt); row extras enforce deny-over-allow, cross_tenant_access_allowed=false, permission_decision_detail excluded, lock_token excluded, performs_rollback/retry_runtime=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true; all six no_leak_guards present. (3) Authority: validateEmailDmsCoreCp291FailureSliceDescriptor and the contract assert claude_is_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; no_write_attestation inherits promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false. Hermes appears only as a deterministic H08 evidence/gate descriptor (receipt_shape descriptor_only..._no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false) - not embedded product runtime. (4) Tests/validation: model.test.js and the rp08 validator deep-equal the persisted contract to code constants and gate production_ready_candidate on real coverage+slice validity; command-evidence shows all pre-review gates passing exit 0 (node --check/--test, rp05/rp06/rp07/rp08 validators, closeout-pack-plan, weighted, spec:requirements, rp00 control-plane, goal:closeout, fullplan, npm test/validate/build, git diff --check); readiness auth-preflight passed with well-formed non-empty JSON (no auth failure, 0-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped, or missing-field evidence). (5) Scope hygiene: index.js uses wildcard re-exports so CP291 functions are auto-exported (consistent with it being an implementation ref but not git-modified); unrelated dirty/untracked files (the .docx, ldip c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt, new-session-handoff) are correctly classified out of pack scope. production_ready remains false with status implemented_pending_review, correctly deferring final/enterprise-trust approval to humans. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; post-review adjudication/construction-inspection/claude-review-result artifacts are produced later in the hardening sequence and their current absence is expected, not a defect.
